<!--
Thanks for contributing to Flowy CLI! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep the PR focused — one logical change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new command, flag, or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` / `chore` / `ci` / `test` — no user-facing behavior change
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (enforced by commitlint).
- [ ] `bun run check` passes (Biome lint + format).
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `bun run test` passes; new behavior has tests.
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `docs/API.md`, or the command reference) where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or tokens committed.

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
